description: Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in components/select.inc in the Webform module 6.x-3.x before 6.x-3.17 and 7.x-3.x before 7.x-3.17 for Drupal, when the "Select (or other)" module is enabled, allow remote authenticated users with the create webform content permission to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via vectors related to (1) checkboxes or (2) radios.
